mapper.sql: fl.id, fl.description, fl.exception_detail, fl.log_type, fl.method, fl.params, fl.request_ip, fl.time, fl.username, fl.address, fl.browser, fl.create_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.description as ${tAlias}_description, ${tAlias}.exception_detail as ${tAlias}_exception_detail, ${tAlias}.log_type as ${tAlias}_log_type, ${tAlias}.method as ${tAlias}_method, ${tAlias}.params as ${tAlias}_params, ${tAlias}.request_ip as ${tAlias}_request_ip, ${tAlias}.time as ${tAlias}_time, ${tAlias}.username as ${tAlias}_username, ${tAlias}.address as ${tAlias}_address, ${tAlias}.browser as ${tAlias}_browser, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_log (description, exception_detail, log_type, method, params, request_ip, time, username, address, browser, create_time) values (#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{browser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update fnd_log set description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exception_detail = #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, log_type = #{logType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, method = #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, params = #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_ip = #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, time = #{time,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, browser = #{browser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from (select fl.request_ip from fnd_log fl where fl.create_time between #{date1,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and #{date2,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by fl.request_ip) tmp
